title: GoalOS Signoff Pro — Proof-Gated Mission Foundry & Curriculum Lab

scenarios.label: Research acceptance
scenarios.objective: Turn an accepted research Evidence Docket into a harder, replayable follow-on mission.
scenarios.nextMission: Mission 002 — reproduce claims under external replay constraints

scenarios.label: Software delivery
scenarios.objective: Turn a signed delivery receipt into a bounded regression and transfer mission.
scenarios.nextMission: Mission 002 — validate transfer to a harder repository task

scenarios.label: Procurement proof room
scenarios.objective: Turn vendor evidence into a structured challenge mission with hidden contradiction checks.
scenarios.nextMission: Mission 002 — run comparator and risk-bound replay

scenarios.label: Safety escalation
scenarios.objective: Turn accepted safety evidence into a safer, harder escalation test with rollback boundaries.
scenarios.nextMission: Mission 002 — test delayed-risk detection and quarantine behavior

candidateSeeds.name: Narrative moonshot
candidateSeeds.reason: interesting language, no validator, no replay path, broad claim boundary

candidateSeeds.name: Promising task idea
candidateSeeds.reason: useful but validator requirements and acceptance tests are incomplete

candidateSeeds.name: High-impact escalation
candidateSeeds.reason: impact is high, but risk boundary and rollback plan are not sufficient

candidateSeeds.name: Proof-gated harder mission
candidateSeeds.reason: clear validator, bounded risk, replay path, challenge window, and reuse objective

boundary.claimBoundary: Synthetic public demonstration only. No external audit, production certification, live settlement, value movement, or AGI/ASI attainment claim.
